title: Vanilla Planifolia
description: The ultimate, lightweight and client-sided, Vanilla-enhanced modpack you will ever need! Built for QoL accessibility and graphics within multiplayer environments.
body: ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b978a78023a9532077672524be8473cc1a902fe.png) ![divider](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/cdn.avatarka.ge/divider_white.png) Vanilla Planifolia is a lightweight, client-sided, modpack based on the modifications and resource packs used by AvatarKage over many years, including newer releases adopted specifically for this pack. It focuses on quality-of-life accessibility improvements and graphical overhauls. During technical testings on a Nvidia RTX 3050 laptop, the pack rendered an average of 70fps with shaders disabled. This modpack is Fabric exclusive for performance and quality purposes, and is only officially distributed on Modrinth for Minecraft 1.21.10+. ## QoL Features - Take automatic screenshots when completing advancements - Keep track of your saturation within hunger bar - Re-authenticate to Microsoft without restarting your game - See live player ping in numbers rather than bars - Start purchasing a server directly within the menu - View hand-held maps when sailing a boat - Cache chunks to render beyond the server's maximum limit - View capes from various APIs including Optifine and MinecraftCapes.net - Display skin heads and mention pings in chat - Prevent chat reports and hide unsigned warnings - Pin favorite worlds and servers to the top of your list - See clearer through a more transparent water - Optimizations such as fast loading, xp clumps, and entity culling - An index in the menu to quickly track and view collected blocks and items - Easily search through and filter keybinds, and added controller support - Maximize your window to a borderless-fullscreen - Swing through grass for easier entity hitting - Deleted words move to trash instead of being permanently deleted - Dynamic FPS to save CPU and GPU power when not focused on the game window - Quickly type emojis in chat including custom additions - Option to fast quit a world or quit the game instantly - Toggle full-brightness to gain indefinite night-vision - Press ALT to access an overview of every block, item, enchant, and effect - Get an informative tooltip on the top center of your screen when looking at a block - Save waypoints and never get lost with an advanced and customizable mini-map - Switch languages without a loading screen - Display hunger bar when riding a horse, and display a totems bar - Being on fire no-longer blocks half of your screen - NBT auto-complete for developers - Prevent crashes from closing the full game - Create global notes to keep track of plans or remember things - Get notified when picking up items to the lower right of your screen - Search through containers for specific items - View what is in your shulker and enderchest without accessing them - Prevent OpenGL errors from displaying - Armor durability hud with warnings when close to breaking - Properly render all armor trims on armors in inventory - Edit modpack configuration within a easy to use editor - Optifine-like zoom with scrolling support ## Graphical Features - 3D skin layers (players only) and armor on all entites - Supports Just Expressions/Fresh Moves animated eyes - Revamped various interfaces and tooltips - Refreshed many entity textures and models with unique varients - Randomized Bedrock-like shading across biomes with better blending - Animated player, entities, and capes - Display true axolotl colors in buckets - Optifine-like grass and snow, with extra additions - Smooth chat animation - Beautiful shader with custom settings - Connected textures for many blocks, including glass - Optional dark GUI - Render unlimited cached chunks with Distant Horizons - Dyed horse armor properly renders the dyed portions - Enchantment outlines on weapons - Overhauls various blocks, explosions, and mace impacts - Revamped weather and environment with smoother appearances - Immersive textures on many blocks with dynamic lighting - Leaf litter and water re-tints - The mace is now 3D and has spikes when enchanted - Bubbles pop when they reach the surface - Many new environmental particles, including for various actions - Display the playtime on your worlds - All potions and enchanted books have custom designs for accessibility - Render tools and weapons within the hotbar on player ## Extra Features - Global sound enhancements - Elytra physics when walking - View your hand holding items - Take in-game cinematics with FlashBack's powerful editor - Comes ready with AvatarKage's community Minecraft server when it launches - Discord RPC to feature this modpack when using it - WorldEdit for quick local creative world editing ## Need a Server? Click below to get started!
